event_claims.description: The Board authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities available to Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: at an in-person meeting of the Board on April 5, 2013, the Board discussed the sale of CSC to Pamplona as well as industry-wide merger and acquisition activity and dynamics, and authorized Mac-Gray management to work with BofA Merrill Lynch to explore transactional opportunities that might be available to Mac-Gray

event_claims.description: The Special Committee concluded that it was in stockholders' best interests to consider a potential sale of Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text: the Special Committee concluded that it would be in the best interests of stockholders to consider a potential sale of Mac-Gray

event_claims.description: The Special Committee determined to approach 50 parties to solicit potential interest in a transaction with Mac-Gray.
event_claims.quote_text:
the Special Committee determined to approach a total of

50 parties, including CSC and Pamplona, who together we refer to as CSC/Pamplona, and Party A, to solicit potential interest in a transaction with Mac-Gray

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $19.50 per share and requested exclusive negotiations for two weeks.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 9, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $19.50 per share, indicating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 9, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.50 per share and proposed to finance the transaction with a combination of equity from affiliated funds and third party debt.

event_claims.description: Party A submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 10, 2013, Party A submitted a revised indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share, to be financed by outstanding credit facilities or affiliated equity sources.

event_claims.description: Party C indicated it was submitting a revised oral indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 10, 2013, in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch, a representative of Party C indicated that it was submitting a revised oral indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share.

participation_count_claims.quote_text: Between August 6, 2013 and August 27, 2013, the four bidders conducted business and legal due diligence.
